# Client package structure

Every GitHub Copilot Usage-Based Billing client package generated by this skill lives under the repository root directory `client-ubb-transition-kits/`.

The reference package `REFERENCES_gh-ubb-customers-kit/` is the structure and source-data reference. Do not write generated client packages into the reference folder.

## Root output directory

```text
client-ubb-transition-kits/
  <ClientSlug>_<TPID>/
```

`<ClientSlug>` is built from the audited `top_parent` value in `db.json`, normalized for the file system. The TPID is appended to avoid ambiguous client names.

## Required client folder tree

```text
client-ubb-transition-kits/<ClientSlug>_<TPID>/
  db.json
  INTERNAL_Budget_Impact_Analysis/
    INTERNAL_ONLY - <Client>_Analise_Budget_v<version>_<date>_multi.html
  INTERNAL_Transition_Kit/
    INTERNAL_ONLY - Kit_Transicao_UBB_<Client>_v<version>_<date>_EN.xlsx
  EXTERNAL_Customer_Ready_Documents/
    customer-deck/
      CUSTOMER_Deck_<Client>_06_Month_Program_v<version>_<date>_multi.html
      pdf/
        <DeckBase>/
          <DeckBase>_pt-BR.pdf
      pptx/
        <DeckBase>/
          <DeckBase>_pt-BR.pptx
          <DeckBase>_en.pptx
          <DeckBase>_es.pptx
      qa/
        <DeckBase>_pt-BR_contact_sheet.jpg
        <DeckBase>_<locale>_structure_contact_sheet.jpg
        visual-qa-report.json
    customer-ready-playbooks/
      Proposta_Acao_UBB_<Client>_Editorial_v<version>_<date>_ptBR.pdf
      Runbook Otimizacao GitHubCopilot UBB v4 0 0 2026-06-09 ptBR.pdf
      Playbook Implementacao GitHubCopilot UBB v4 0 0 2026-06-09 ptBR.pdf
      GitHubCopilot_UBB_Runbook_TechDoc_v5_0_0_2026-06-11_ptBR.pdf
      GitHubCopilot_UBB_Otimizacao_Guia_v3_2_0_2026-06-10_ptBR.pdf
```

Imported packages also include `package-manifest.json` in the package root. The manifest records source paths, destination paths, byte counts, SHA-256 checksums, TPID, `top_parent`, source `db.json` version, and import timestamp.

The generated package may keep older versions only inside an `archive/` folder under the same deliverable directory. The root of each deliverable directory keeps only the latest version.

## Per-client db.json snapshot

The package root `db.json` is generated from the canonical source `db.json`. It is a per-client snapshot, not a hand-authored file.

It must include:

- `source`, with the source file name, source version, and source generation date.
- `meta`, copied from the canonical source.
- `client`, the row from `clientes` for the TPID.
- `ranking_brasil`, the row from `ranking_brasil` for the TPID.
- `cliente_modelo`, every model row for the TPID.
- `modelos_tokens`, every model token row for the TPID.
- `uso_mensal`, every monthly usage row for the TPID.
- `billable_owners`, every billable-owner row for the TPID.

If any required section is absent for a client, stop and report the missing section. Do not estimate or backfill values.

## Generic PDFs

The generic customer-ready PDFs are copied unchanged from:

```text
REFERENCES_gh-ubb-customers-kit/EXTERNAL_Customer_Ready_Documents/customer-ready-playbooks/
```

These generic PDFs are shared across all clients:

- `Runbook Otimizacao GitHubCopilot UBB v4 0 0 2026-06-09 ptBR.pdf`
- `Playbook Implementacao GitHubCopilot UBB v4 0 0 2026-06-09 ptBR.pdf`
- `GitHubCopilot_UBB_Runbook_TechDoc_v5_0_0_2026-06-11_ptBR.pdf`
- `GitHubCopilot_UBB_Otimizacao_Guia_v3_2_0_2026-06-10_ptBR.pdf`

The proposal PDF is client-specific and must be generated for the client. Do not copy the BTG proposal to another client.

## Validation

Validate the canonical source before generation:

```bash
python3 .github/skills/client-ubb-transition-kit/assets/package_customer_kit.py validate-db \
  --db REFERENCES_gh-ubb-customers-kit/db.json
```

Initialize a package folder and the per-client source snapshot:

```bash
python3 .github/skills/client-ubb-transition-kit/assets/package_customer_kit.py init-client \
  --db REFERENCES_gh-ubb-customers-kit/db.json \
  --reference-root REFERENCES_gh-ubb-customers-kit \
  --tpid <TPID>
```

Initialize every generation-ready ranked client:

```bash
python3 .github/skills/client-ubb-transition-kit/assets/package_customer_kit.py init-all-clients \
  --db REFERENCES_gh-ubb-customers-kit/db.json \
  --reference-root REFERENCES_gh-ubb-customers-kit \
  --output-root client-ubb-transition-kits
```

The command skips clients with missing audited source sections and reports those rows as `SOURCE-GAP`.

Import the 17 audited customer transition plan packages:

```bash
python3 .github/skills/client-ubb-transition-kit/assets/package_customer_kit.py import-transition-plan \
  --db REFERENCES_gh-ubb-customers-kit/db.json \
  --reference-root REFERENCES_gh-ubb-customers-kit \
  --source REFERENCES_gh-ubb-customers-kit/00-Customers_Transition_Plan \
  --output-root client-ubb-transition-kits
```

The importer copies the four custom artifacts from each source client folder into the standard package tree, copies generic PDFs, writes the per-client `db.json`, and writes `package-manifest.json`. It does not modify files under `REFERENCES_gh-ubb-customers-kit/00-Customers_Transition_Plan/`.

Generate PDF and PowerPoint derivatives for every imported six-month customer deck:

```bash
python3 .github/skills/client-ubb-transition-kit/assets/package_customer_kit.py generate-deck-derivatives \
  --output-root client-ubb-transition-kits
```

The derivative generator uses the `ms-presentation-deck` scripts. It creates one PT-BR PDF and three native editable PPTX files per deck (`pt-BR`, `en`, `es`), then records all derivative checksums in `package-manifest.json`.

Run visual QA for the deck derivatives:

```bash
python3 .github/skills/client-ubb-transition-kit/assets/package_customer_kit.py visual-qa-deck-derivatives \
  --output-root client-ubb-transition-kits
```

The visual QA command writes contact sheets and `visual-qa-report.json` under each package's `customer-deck/qa/` folder, plus `client-ubb-transition-kits/visual-qa-summary.json`.

Validate a completed package:

```bash
python3 .github/skills/client-ubb-transition-kit/assets/package_customer_kit.py validate-package \
  --db REFERENCES_gh-ubb-customers-kit/db.json \
  --reference-root REFERENCES_gh-ubb-customers-kit \
  --package client-ubb-transition-kits/<ClientSlug>_<TPID>
```

## Current reference-source caveat

The current reference `db.json` contains 95 ranked clients. In the current file, TPID `136779188` (`Mycapital`) has no `uso_mensal` rows. That client is not generation-ready until an audited monthly usage series is added to the canonical source.
